title: Change a project/board template
excerpt: It would be great if there was the ability to change a template, for example if you realise you had selected the wrong template.  It could pull in the new groups and any groups from the initially selected template could …

posts.author: Caroline24 (Caroline Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if there was the ability to change a template, for example if you realise you had selected the wrong template. It could pull in the new groups and any groups from the initially selected template could be deleted en masse.
